bond.name: 国泰上证5年期国债ETF
bond.continuity_reason: 连续交易ETF替代存在断月的旧收益链

commodity.name: 华安黄金ETF
commodity.continuity_reason: 连续交易且具备做市服务，替代2014-08断月的旧黄金ETF历史

cash.name: 银华日利ETF
cash.continuity_reason: 159001.SZ在2025-04至2026-04无成交，改用持续上市交易的货币ETF

methodology.rebalance: month_end_signal_to_next_month_etf_return; holdings drift through realized return before the next trade
methodology.point_in_time_selection: factor identity=train; noncompensatory candidate gate=train; final choice=validation; test=report-only and excluded from scores
methodology.benchmark: equal_weight 25/25/25/25 monthly rebalance from drifted holdings with identical costs
methodology.recommended_model: strategic prior + multi-horizon trend posterior + breadth-conditioned stable risk sleeve + volatility/correlation diversification + smooth equity risk-off gate
methodology.equity_preference: 45% strategic equity prior and higher equity risk budget; predeclared 10% crisis floor permits genuine risk-off execution
methodology.llm_policy: server-side cited explanation only; cannot overwrite deterministic weights

factor_registry.name: 普林格六阶段
factor_registry.transform: 因果标准化、训练期筛选、六状态路径约束贝叶斯滤波

factor_registry.name: 朱格拉资本开支周期
factor_registry.transform: 60-132月频带评分、信用水平与12月斜率

factor_registry.name: 康波结构情景
factor_registry.transform: 84月以上慢变量；样本不足强制低置信度

factor_registry.name: 美林投资时钟
factor_registry.transform: 概率四象限与普林格交叉验证

factor_registry.name: 宏观因子风险预算
factor_registry.transform: 滚动OLS暴露、因子协方差与特异风险
factor_registry.allocation_role: 避免资产风险平价的宏观风险集中

factor_registry.name: 多模型组合优化
factor_registry.transform: 训练初筛、验证择优、测试封印、DSR/PBO
factor_registry.allocation_role: 输出权益偏好推荐权重

factor_registry.name: LLM证据层
factor_registry.transform: 服务端结构化上下文、时点与冲突检查
factor_registry.allocation_role: 生成解释报告，不改写生产权重

factor_registry.name: 多周期趋势后验与扩散度
factor_registry.transform: 风险调整趋势经Logistic映射为后验概率；跨期限加权形成扩散度；与战略先验和稳定风险袖套组合
factor_registry.allocation_role: 动态风险预算、权益防守门与现金需求，不使用单点阈值直接交易

factor_selection.policy: causal candidates; factor identity selected on training only; validation/test never select factors

states.name: 逆周期启动
states.summary: 先行指标转强，同步与滞后指标仍弱；政策与流动性先于实体修复。
states.asset_bias: 债券占优，权益开始左侧布局。

states.name: 复苏
states.summary: 先行、同步指标改善，通胀尚低，增长从底部扩散。
states.asset_bias: 权益与债券均衡，逐步降低现金。

states.name: 共振上行
states.summary: 增长、信用与价格共同向上，盈利与需求形成正反馈。
states.asset_bias: 权益为主，商品获得顺周期配置。

states.name: 过热
states.summary: 增长仍强但先行指标降温，通胀与政策约束开始上升。
states.asset_bias: 商品相对占优，权益控制久期与估值暴露。

states.name: 滞胀
states.summary: 增长转弱而价格压力仍高，盈利下修与成本冲击并存。
states.asset_bias: 商品、现金防御，降低权益风险。

states.name: 共振下行
states.summary: 先行、同步、滞后指标均弱，需求收缩并等待政策再启动。
states.asset_bias: 债券与现金防御，等待逆周期信号。

states.name: 主动补库
states.summary: 需求改善、价格回升，企业主动增加库存。
states.asset_bias: 权益、商品偏强。

states.name: 被动补库
states.summary: 需求转弱但库存仍上升，产成品被动积压。
states.asset_bias: 降低权益，转向债券与现金。

states.name: 主动去库
states.summary: 企业主动削减库存，需求和价格尚弱。
states.asset_bias: 债券、现金防御。

states.name: 被动去库
states.summary: 需求先行修复而库存继续下降，周期接近底部。
states.asset_bias: 权益左侧增配。

states.name: 修复
states.summary: 信用先行改善，资本开支与产能利用率仍在底部。
states.asset_bias: 权益逐步提高，保留债券缓冲。

states.name: 扩张
states.summary: 信用与资本开支同步向上，产能和盈利扩张。
states.asset_bias: 权益占优，商品顺周期受益。

states.name: 过热
states.summary: 资本开支高位但信用边际收紧，供给约束与通胀上升。
states.asset_bias: 商品相对占优，降低高估值权益。

states.name: 收缩
states.summary: 信用与资本开支回落，需求和盈利承压。
states.asset_bias: 债券、现金防御。

states.name: 复苏
states.summary: 长期需求、技术扩散与资本形成从低位修复。
states.asset_bias: 战略增配权益，保留通胀对冲。

states.name: 繁荣
states.summary: 创新扩散与资本形成共振，长期增长和价格中枢抬升。
states.asset_bias: 权益与商品占优。

states.name: 衰退
states.summary: 资本回报下降、债务约束增强，长期增长动能转弱。
states.asset_bias: 降低权益，提高债券与现金。

states.name: 萧条/创新孕育
states.summary: 旧产能出清，新技术处于投入与孕育期。
states.asset_bias: 防御为主，并保留长期创新期权。

states.name: 复苏
states.summary: 增长上行、通胀下行，盈利修复且政策约束较低。
states.asset_bias: 权益占优。

states.name: 过热
states.summary: 增长与通胀同步上行，政策收紧概率提高。
states.asset_bias: 商品占优。

states.name: 滞胀
states.summary: 增长下行、通胀上行，实际回报承压。
states.asset_bias: 现金与商品防御。

states.name: 衰退
states.summary: 增长与通胀同步下行，宽松预期增强。
states.asset_bias: 债券占优。

research_evidence.title: 大类资产配置框架——基于普林格经济周期六段论

AI视角驱动的Black-Litterman资产配置

research_evidence.method: 多重试验、非正态与选择偏差校正

research_evidence.title: LLM-Based Macro and Sector Asset Allocation

research_evidence.title: AI赋能资产配置（八）：DeepSeek在资产配置中的实战解答
research_evidence.method: 政策文本按时间顺序结构化，宏观、流动性、情绪与估值多维交叉验证

research_evidence.method: RAG、Agent、工具调用与可验证回测闭环

research_evidence.title: 因子投资与隐含因子研究
research_evidence.method: 价格隐含因子的高频更新与协方差降维

research_evidence.title: A Century of Generalized Momentum; From Flexible Asset Allocations to Elastic Asset Allocation
research_evidence.method: 绝对动量、相对动量、波动率与相关性联合配置

research_evidence.title: The Impact of Volatility Targeting
research_evidence.method: 波动率缩放的风险控制、换手与成本权衡

research_evidence.title: Time Series Momentum: Is it There?
research_evidence.method: 趋势与反转并存、跨周期稳健性检验

backtest.benchmark_definition: 25% equity + 25% bond + 25% commodity + 25% cash; monthly rebalance from drifted holdings; same ETFs and costs

train.role: predeclared factor/model discovery and nested subperiod gate

test.role: report-only; excluded from every selection score

selection_audit.selection_rule: non-compensatory train gate -> validation absolute/active/IR gate -> robust validation score; test is report-only and never ranks candidates
selection_audit.benchmark_definition: 25% equity + 25% bond + 25% commodity + 25% cash; monthly rebalance from drifted holdings; same ETFs and costs
selection_audit.eligibility_policy: equity preference is a 45% strategic prior and higher risk budget, while the posterior may reduce equity to the predeclared 10% risk-off floor

promotion_gate.policy: test metrics are disclosed after selection and cannot repair a failed train/validation or overfit gate

optimization.selection_rule: non-compensatory train gate -> validation absolute/active/IR gate -> robust validation score; test is report-only and never ranks candidates
optimization.benchmark_definition: 25% equity + 25% bond + 25% commodity + 25% cash; monthly rebalance from drifted holdings; same ETFs and costs
optimization.eligibility_policy: equity preference is a 45% strategic prior and higher risk budget, while the posterior may reduce equity to the predeclared 10% risk-off floor

promotion_gate.policy: test metrics are disclosed after selection and cannot repair a failed train/validation or overfit gate

checks.detail: 25% equity + 25% bond + 25% commodity + 25% cash; monthly rebalance from drifted holdings; same ETFs and costs
non-compensatory train gate -> validation absolute/active/IR gate -> robust validation score; test is report-only and never ranks candidates
train excess, validation absolute and active return
non-compensatory train gate -> validation absolute/active/IR gate -> robust validation score; test is report-only and never ranks candidates

limitations: 商品类别以黄金ETF代表贵金属风险，不能等同全品种商品期货指数。
债券历史由当时可交易国债ETF与当前地方债ETF收益链接；切换点置零一日收益。
宏观月度表尚非完整发布时点vintage库。
康波样本不足一个完整长周期，仅为低置信度结构情景。
2023年以来是报告期且已被研发人员观察，不宣称为从未查看的真实影子样本；程序保证其不进入候选排序。
历史超额收益不构成未来收益承诺。
